assessment_summary: This video appears to be a promotional/marketing video for LAPARO Medical Simulators equipment. The frames show product demonstrations, text overlays about hospitals/universities/training centers, and company branding. No actual FLS task performance is visible - only equipment setup, brief glimpses of simulator screens, and marketing content. This is not scoreable as an FLS performance video.

frame_analyses.description: Text overlay showing 'HOSPITALS', 'MEDICAL UNIVERSITIES', 'MEDICAL SIMULATION CENTERS', 'LAPAROSCOPIC WORKSHOP ORGANIZERS' with LAPARO equipment in background
Text overlay 'TOUCHSCREEN C' with hand pointing at interface
Final company logo and website www.laparo.pl

confidence_rationale: Very clear that this is promotional content for LAPARO simulator equipment, not an FLS task performance
